task_statement: FINAL architecture next god-module shrink. Implement the conservation-ledger move recorded in project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/customer-ready-final-architecture-gate-evidence-readers-ledger-0630.md. Move exactly the gate-evidence reader helper cluster from support/checkers/lib/case_runners.py into one new flat sibling support/checkers/lib/gate_evidence_readers.py, preserving the five moved function bodies byte-identically and re-exporting the moved private helper names from case_runners.py so all existing call sites and profile cases behave identically. Add exactly one module_registry.yaml row for the new sibling with support/checkers/lib checker-lib ownership only. Do NOT move _preset_slug, _case_slug, or _split_ref_row (they stay in case_runners.py). Do not split kernel_checks, walker/run, profiles, or create folders/module families. Verification: import smoke for moved names; git diff --check; compileall for touched checker-lib modules; PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity:. python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all. Mutation-RED probes may be recorded as not_proven in sandbox if temp/probe limitations arise, but do not fake them.

nodes.work_statement: Implement only the conservation-ledger leaf extraction: create support/checkers/lib/gate_evidence_readers.py; move exactly _assert_no_missing_gate_facts, _assert_missing_gate_fact_present, _gate_evidence_paths, _json_records, and _nested_values_for_key from case_runners.py with byte-identical bodies; import/re-export them in case_runners.py; add one module_registry row for the new sibling. Do NOT move _preset_slug, _case_slug, or _split_ref_row. Do not change profiles or runtime code. Run listed verification and report exact commands.

Code-attack QA. Inspect sandbox diff and verify: only the three allowed support/checkers files changed; the five moved helper bodies are byte-identical; _preset_slug/_case_slug/_split_ref_row remain in case_runners.py; all five moved names remain importable from support.checkers.lib.case_runners; module_registry row is support-only with no axis ownership; no profiles/checker semantics changed; git diff --check, compileall, and check_profile.py --all are green or blockers are honest. Do not source-mutate.

Axis-attack QA. Verify Brick/Agent/Link boundaries: this is support checker-lib gate-evidence reader relocation only, no Movement authority, no target selector, no source truth, no success/quality judgment, no new module family/folder hierarchy, no credential/session data. Check diff against the ledger and report any boundary gap. Do not source-mutate.

Closure synthesis. Read work + both QA returns. If implementation and QA support the conservation ledger, return forward evidence with exact changed files, sandbox commit, frontier limits, commands run, and not_proven. If any implementation_gap or boundary_mismatch remains, raise transition_concern_evidence instead of claiming closure.
